name: Ultimate scraper: multi-URL scrape with AI extraction
description: Scrapes multiple URLs using Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to extract and structure data from each page, compiles all results, and posts a comprehensive summary to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for web scraping

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting results

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for posting scraped data

urls.description: Comma-separated list of URLs to scrape (e.g. 'https://example.com/page1, https://example.com/page2')

extractionGoal.description: What data to extract from the pages (e.g. 'product names, prices, and descriptions', 'company info and contact details')

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for data extraction
Run Claude AI for data extraction
Build Slack Block Kit message with scraped data
